---
title: "Working Papers"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

:::{.paper}
:::{.wp-tag}
WP / 01
:::
:::{.paper-body}
"Minimum wages, Inequality, and the Informal Sector", joint with [Rafael Machado Parente](https://www.rparente.com) and [Luiz Brotherhood](https://sites.google.com/site/luizbrotherhood/).

[*Revised version soon*]{.status .wip}
:::
:::{.actions}
[page →](papers/minwage-inequality.qmd)
[pdf ↓](working_papers/Minw_Ineq_Inf.pdf)
:::
:::

:::{.paper}
:::{.wp-tag}
WP / 02
:::
:::{.paper-body}
"Subjective beliefs, disagreement, and market return predictability", joint with [Raul Riva](https://rgriva.github.io).

[*Revision requested, Critical Finance Review*]{.status .rev}
:::
:::{.actions}
[page →](papers/ibes-market-returns.qmd)
[pdf ↓](working_papers/IBES_and_Market_Returns.pdf)
:::
:::

:::{.paper}
:::{.wp-tag}
WP / 03
:::
:::{.paper-body}
"Monetary policy and labor markets in a developing economy", joint with [Diego B. P. Gomes](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=rdZgUZwAAAAJ&hl=pt-BR), [Ana Paula Ruhe](https://sites.google.com/view/anapaularuhe/home), and [Cezar Santos](https://sites.google.com/site/czrsantos/).

[*Revised and resubmitted, Journal of Money, Credit, and Banking*]{.status .rnr}
:::
:::{.actions}
[page →](papers/monetary-policy-heterogeneity.qmd)
[pdf ↓](working_papers/Monetary_Policy_and_Heterogeneity.pdf)
:::
:::

:::{.paper}
:::{.wp-tag}
WP / 04
:::
:::{.paper-body}
"Spatial risk premia in residential real estate", joint with [Leandro Gorno](https://sites.google.com/site/leandrogorno/) and [Ana Paula Ruhe](https://sites.google.com/view/anapaularuhe/home).

[*Work in Progress*]{.status .wip}
:::
:::{.actions}
[page →](papers/spatial-risk-premia.qmd)
:::
:::
